title: BORN AGAIN AT BOTTOM-TIER
overview: A hardcore gamer is reborn when he chooses to play on Hell Mode difficulty. Now he needs to figure out how his summoning skills work. While still a baby.

title: The Appraisal Ceremony
overview: Little does Allen know that the Appraisal Ceremony will expose the brutal reality of playing on Hell Mode.

title: Trouble
overview: Allen experiments with his Summoner abilities, unaware that a coming crisis will remind him that the world he treats as a game is a harsh reality for others.

title: Allen Spills the Beans
overview: Allen decides to tell his parents about his abilities.

title: A Summoner's Potential
overview: Allen's hunting strategies have paid off, but the fledgling summoner still has a long way to go. Especially when he must now deduce the purpose of his new storage skill.

title: Outward Bound
overview: The baron wishes to observe Allen's boar hunts firsthand. If he's impressed, there may even be a reward; one that could change both Allen and his family's life forever.

title: Life With The Granvelles
overview: Allen begins his new life as a manservant of the Gravelle Family. Fortunately for him, that doesn't mean the end of a life of monster hunting.

title: Huntsman
overview: Allen's uncanny ability to hunt monsters earns him a promotion, and the baron's family awaits a visit from the eldest son. Life is good. For now.

title: The Murdergalsh
overview: Allen realizes he's still got a long way to go after a B-rank monster attacks the city. If he wants to face the challenges ahead, he must unlock his class's true potential.

title: The Noble's Duty
overview: Allen may have figured out his class, but that doesn't mean he's figured out the world.

title: Sneak Attack
overview: Allen merely sees the Armored Ant colony as a test of his abilities. He has no idea that victory could lead to political consequences.

title: The Escape
overview: Allen and Cecil have a long, dangerous road ahead of them. Reaching safety means facing more than just one threat.
